title: InstallationProgress
description: InstallationProgress: Installation progress in a specific area associated with an audit, including image filepaths as applicable

Status.description: The general status of installation progress at the time of the inspection.

Area.description: Description for the area that this installation progress refers to.

Media.description: Filenames of images showing the construction progress in the area specified.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
